title: U.S. online food delivery market share 2025 - DoorDash dominates with 60%+ share
text: By the end of 2024, DoorDash led the national food delivery market with a 60.7% share, ahead of Uber Eats (26.1%) and Grubhub (6.3%). With varying estimates depending on the data source, DoorDash holds between 56-68% share in the US food delivery market. DoorDash dominates the market while facing competitive pressures from Uber Eats and Grubhub. However, market share varies significantly by region. In the New York City area, DoorDash (38.4%) and Uber Eats (38.2%) were nearly tied by the end of 2024. In San Francisco, DoorDash outpaces all other food delivery services with 74% market share. DoorDash generated $10.72 billion in revenue in 2024, with total Q1 2025 orders amounting to 732 million, up 18% from Q1 2024's 620 million figure. This dominant market position provides DoorDash with significant scale advantages and pricing power.
